title: West Bengal Election 2026: Massive 92.86% Voter Turnout In Phase 1, Election Commission 'Salutes' Every Voter
description: Phase 1 witnessed polling across 16 districts, including the entire North Bengal region (Cooch Behar, Alipurduar, Jalpaiguri, Darjeeling, and others), parts of South Bengal, and Jangalmahal areas such as Purulia, Bankura, Jhargram, and Paschim Medinipur.
